items.title: Release 5.3.3
items.body:
# Release Notes

## Component Library (4.54.6)

### Fixes
- Corrected sanitization of HTML IDs in the BaseController to prevent potential rendering issues.
- Fixed aspect ratio issues for term icons to ensure consistent display.
- Resolved a styling issue related to typography when using shortcodes in context.

### Improvements and Refactoring
- Refactored slider button functionality for better clarity and maintainability.
- Removed unnecessary constructor requirement from `ImageFocusResolverInterface`, simplifying its implementation.

---

## Algolia Index JS Searchpage (3.3.4)

### Features
- Added a new **Typesense adapter** for search, allowing integration with the Typesense engine for improved relevance and performance.
- Added additional domains to the **Content Security Policy (CSP)** configuration to ensure required external services are allowed and function correctly.

---

## Alarm Integration (4.0.11)

### Features
- Adds the ability to display an **automatic fire alarm banner** on each page when a fire alarm is set to high.

---

## Modularity Like Posts (2.14.4)

### Fixes and Improvements
- Prevented sticky posts from being retrieved when not intended.
- Fixed an issue where only allowed post types should be set.
- Improved markup handling to prevent rendering issues in views.
- Fixed a bug where passing an empty list of posts could cause Blade template errors.
- Removed unnecessary data (like `blogId`) from being passed to views.
- Cleaned up legacy code, including the removal of unused `getPost()` calls and debug statements.

### Refactoring
- Improved support for handling private posts across multiple blogs.
- Refactored list and collection views for better performance and maintainability.
- Replaced internal permalink logic with `getPermalink()` for consistency.
- Streamlined post type validation logic and corrected `blogId` usage.

### Housekeeping
- Added inline code comments for clarity.
- Removed outdated or redundant code and comments.

---

## WP Security (1.6.10)

### New Features
- Split the logic into separate resolvers for better structure and maintainability.
- Introduced support for a **CSP (Content Security Policy) hook** for flexible CSP configuration.
- Added support for the **Permissions Policy** header.
- Introduced a PHP-based test suite and build validation.

### Fixes and Improvements
- Improved DOM parsing to detect and extract relevant elements, including images inside `<script>` tags.
- Better handling of inline scripts and updated test coverage.
- Simplified and cleaned up test cases, fixtures, and attribute handling.
- Improved normalization of parsed content via an internal normalizer.
- Enhanced filtering of specific element types and attributes.
- Adjusted handling of `<a>` tags (included but without using `href` value).
- Resolved issues with malformed attributes, DOM element checks, and edge cases.
- Allowed `unsafe-eval` in scripts to avoid CSP conflicts.
- Added filter support and documentation for better CSP customization.
- Multiple minor fixes and code cleanup (e.g., typo corrections, `.gitignore` updates).

### Documentation
- Updated README and added internal comments for clarity and maintainability.

---

## Modularity (6.87.7)

### New Features
- Added **user group visibility restrictions** for posts.
- Introduced a new **hero layout** for enhanced presentation.
- Posts module now uses a dedicated **image retrieval method** for better consistency.

### Fixes and Improvements
- Fixed pagination failure in post modules.
- Corrected post status filtering.
- Resolved bug with mocked user IDs in place of real ones.
- Fixed missing blog name in the news list view.
- Sticky posts are now correctly prioritized in multisite queries.
- Sanitized post excerpts by removing unwanted `<a>` tags.
- Used GMT post dates for accurate date comparisons.
- Fixed malformed URLs in post archive filters.
- Addressed language detector crash for large modules.
- Fixed CSV module update failures.
- Corrected shortcode context detection for rendering.

### Refactoring and Styling
- Updated file list styles to use heading font.
- Changed input type to `search` and added icon for better UX.
- Refactored Splide slider custom button implementation.

### Development & Dependency Updates
- Upgraded `league/commonmark` for compatibility and security.
- Updated ACF service dependency to version 1.1.0.

---

## Municipio Theme (5.156.2)

### New Features
- **Table of Contents (ToC):** Auto-generates a clickable index for better navigation of long content.
- **Error Page Customizer:** Customize 401, 403, and 404 error pages with headings, images, buttons, and toggleable error codes.
- **Schema-specific Field Control:** Disable standard fields for specific schema types.
- **Post Image Retrieval Method:** More reliable rendering by retrieving images directly from post objects.

### Fixes and Improvements
- **Image Rendering Across Blogs:** Sizes now resolve correctly when fetching images from other blogs.
- **WYSIWYG Image Replacement:** Preserves clickable links when replacing images in rich text.
- **Breadcrumbs Accuracy:** Improved archive page detection for correct breadcrumb paths.
- **Menu Item Indicators:** Menu items with children now show correct visual cues.
- **Hidden Menu Visibility:** Hidden pages are no longer shown to authenticated users.
- **Navigation JS:** Improved handling of nonce values for safer scripting.
- **TinyMCE Plugin Fix:** External plugins now load correctly in the editor.
- **YouTube Link Consistency:** Defaults to `www.` domain for better reliability.
- **Breadcrumb Archive Links:** Fixed broken archive links in breadcrumbs.
- **Mirrored Posts:** Featured images now show properly for multisite mirrored posts.
- **Embed Caching:** oEmbed cache clears correctly to prevent stale content.

### Developer and Internal Enhancements
- **ImageMagick Transparency Fix:** PNGs now converted with GD library to preserve alpha transparency.
- **Improved Image Conversion Performance:** More memory and processing time allocated to prevent crashes.
- **Simplified Heading Styles:** Removed per-module heading style configuration.
- **Customizer Cleanup:** Refactored card and layout sections for clarity.
- **Build Tools Update:** Updated `browsersync` and `webpack-dev-server` for stability.
- **Codebase Refactoring:** Refactored Table of Contents and post decorators for maintainability.
- **Test Maintenance:** Marked incomplete tests in preparation for larger refactor.

### Other
- Adds support for **FrankenPHP/Caddy** and quickstart with **SQLite server**.

items.title: Release 5.3.2
items.body:
# Municipio 5.3.2

**Municipio 5.3.2** is a patch release, fixing some minor bugs in the previous release.

## Modularity

- Fixes a typing error on query param for post module pagination.
- Fixes pagination error on posts module.
- Fixes a migration issue where private modules were ignored by the migration script.

items.title: Release 5.3.1
items.body:
## Municipio Theme (5.153.5)

- New Flexible Header component that displays a button to the user's group homepage, if it exists.
- Fixed SEO redirect permalink fetching when using mirrored post objects.
- Fixed attachment pages not redirecting to real files by default.
- Fixed `fileExists` cache not caching files that were not found.

## Component Library (4.54.1)

- Fixed comment markup for the author by removing disallowed nesting in `<span>` elements.

## Modularity (6.84.1)

- Added an option to the Posts module allowing editors to force external links to open in a new window.
- Posts module now supports pagination in multisite queries.
- Fixed a type comparison error in network permalink resolving in the Posts module.
- Module fragment cache now respects query parameters that may affect the cached state.

## Modularity Like (2.14.1)

- Patched the ability to unlike a post across networks.

## Styleguide (0.11.1277)

- Compressed lists now have a smaller font size and icon by default.

## WP Security (1.3.4)

- Disabled automatic CSP due to issues it caused on search pages.

items.title: Release 5.3.0
items.body:
## Wp Security (1.1.0)

A brand new security plugin has been developed in order to improve WordPress security. This plugin lacks settings but applies some automated headers and other security features:

- Generic login error messages (prevents user enumeration)
- Generic password reset responses (prevents user enumeration)
- HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS) headers if SSL is detected
- Automatic CORS configuration (defaults to current site; additional headers can be set with `.htaccess` if needed)
- Subresource Integrity (SRI) for scripts and styles stored locally on disk
- XML-RPC is automatically disabled
- Improved comment sanitization
- Automatic Content Security Policy (CSP) based on current output (no manual configuration needed)

> **Note:** This is designed as a **MU-plugin**, and cannot be turned off.

---

## Municipio Theme (5.152.0)

- Adds a place search REST endpoint to populate OpenStreetMap with query results
- Improved feature to mirror posts from other sites in the network, including canonical tags and schema data
- Schema data forms improved for schema posts; now utilizing a form factory
- Sanitization of query parameters in the REST render endpoint for menu generation
- Post visibility now respected on post type archive pages when a page is assigned as the archive
- Automatic page tree menus now display private pages if the user is logged in
- Improved custom font rendering by respecting native font-weight
- Attachment pages now redirect to the actual file by default
- Adds customizer settings for breadcrumb display

---

## Modularity (6.81.11)

- Fixes HTML syntax error when modules were rendered inline in the Gutenberg editor
- Removes inline templates in the admin panel (detected automatically)
- Removes insecure JavaScript in the table module that was fetched from a remote service (DataTables)
- Improves output sanitation in the text module
- Mitigates two warnings in the post module regarding archive link placement
- Fixes population of schema select dropdown in the posts module
- Adjusts Text module heading size to align with other modules
- Post module now correctly renders taxonomies
- Adds settings to display module usage in list view, edit view, and frontend edit view

---

## Modularity Like (2.14.0)

- Adds ability to like posts across pages in a network installation

---

## Open Street Map (2.7.5)

- Now uses `PostObjectInterface` schema properly according to specification

---

## Simplify Admin Menus (1.3.0)

- New plugin added to simplify the WordPress admin panel

---

## Event Manager Integration (2.0.32)

- Fixes timezone error when rendering dates in some contexts (specifically archive lists)

---

## Algolia JS Searchpage Addon (3.3.2)

- Declutters rendering by removing number of results and query from the response message (now only rendered in the input field)

---

## Active Directory Integration (3.1.0)

- Sanitizes all `$_GET` and `$_POST` variables handled in the authentication process to prevent malicious requests

---

## Component Library (4.54.0)

- **Breadcrumb:** Adds settings to show prefix label and hide home icon
- **Timeline:** Adds support for sequential mode (without date/time) and current/active step

---

## Other

- Added `publiccode.yml` declaration
- Updated error page to improve rendering of error messages
- Added `install.html` to remove list when deployment runs

---

## Unreleased

This is not yet released; we are currently working on documentation and release notes. This is public since we always try to be as transparent as possible.

items.title: Release 5.2.7
items.body:
### Municipio 5.2.7 - Fixes schema data issues. - Resolves a performance issue related to large lead texts. ### Municipio (5.146.3) - Removes the `force_balance_tags` function, which was previously used to filter large amounts of text and avoid empty `

` tags. - This practice is **not recommended** by WordPress documentation. ### Styleguide (0.11.1251) - Reverts accordion animations that were mistakenly merged. ### Component Library (4.52.13) - Removes XML headers from plus/minus reactive icons. ### OpenStreetMap (2.7.5) - Adds a **hotfix** for issues with `lat/lng` data on the "place" schema type. - A **permanent fix** will be included in the next release.

items.title: Release 5.2.6
items.body:
### WordPress Core (6.8)
- Update WordPress core to version 6.8.

### Modularity (6.81.0)
- Adds the option to display a link to the archive before the post list in the post module.
- Authors can now set a custom label for the archive button.

### Municipio Theme (5.144.9)
- Taxonomy terms are now shown on archive and single post pages.
- Reintroduces the progress bar data on the project schema type.
- Fixes an issue with Quicklinks placement that caused the entire page to render incorrectly.
- Container block now supports setting border radius and shadows.
- Fixes an issue where lat/lng values were cached at runtime, causing all geo coordinates to appear in the same location.

### Modularity Form Builder (3.4.11)
- A default label will not be applied when the upload button label is set to empty.

### Component Library (4.52.12)
- **Fixed:** Headings get different styling even though they have the same heading level.
- Fileinput now handles `max file limit = -1` as the maximum allowed number of files (50).

### Styleguide (0.11.1251)
- Correct button colors in the primary menu to align with colors on link items.

### Visit Custom Posttypes Taxonomies (2.0.6)
- Reflects name changed filter in Municipio handling quicklinks positioning.

items.title: Release 5.2.5
items.body:
# Municipio 5.2.5

**Release type:** Hotfix  
**Summary:** Addresses various issues introduced in version 5.2.4.

---

## Alarm Integration (4.0.9)

- Updates to the latest version of the Alarm Manager integration.
  - Corrects colors and labels for warnings in the fire ban information module.

---

## Municipio Theme (5.142.7)

- Adds a missing constructor parameter in the `E[NNN]` controller.  
  ➤ This previously caused a fatal error on locked pages.
- Defaults to `.woff` font format if the font type cannot be resolved.  
  ➤ Most browsers support both `.woff` and `.woff2` when `.woff` is declared.

---

## ACF OpenStreetMap Field (0.79.10)

- Fixes an issue where data could not be saved due to an unfired ACF hook.

---

## Component Library (4.52.10)

- Ensures sliders with a single slide are displayed.  
  ➤ Bypasses default Splide CSS when sliders haven't initialized.

---

## WPMU Focus Point (0.2.3)

- Renames CSS and style file hooks to namespace assets in the global scope.

items.title: Release 5.2.4
items.body:
## Municipio Theme (5.142.4)

- Adds ability to indent vertical menus (drawer, sidebar). Enabled via Customizer.  
  _(Contributed by Michael Claesson @ Consid)_
- Adds option to choose icon type (caret or plus/minus) for vertical menus in the Customizer.  
  _(Contributed by Michael Claesson @ Consid)_
- Adds support for showing a "current language" button in language menus (configured per menu).  
  _(Contributed by Michael Claesson @ Consid)_
- Customizer settings now apply on AJAX requests for re-rendering components.
- Image focus points can now be set in the media library. These act as defaults when the image contract is used.
- Fixes CSS references for locally uploaded fonts.

---

## Modularity (6.77.2)

- Improves `aria-labelledby` references in the Posts module.
- Image module now properly implements `ImageInterface`.  
  ➤ As a result, the ability to select image size has been removed.
- Accordion module:  
  ➤ Now supports spaced sections and headings outside the card.  
  _(Contributed by Michael Claesson @ Consid)_
- Adds support for download icons and additional file type icons.  
  _(Contributed by Michael Claesson @ Consid)_

---

## Modularity Forms (3.4.10)

- Adds new file and image upload fields.

---

## Event Manager Integration (2.0.31)

- Adds support for the new file upload field when uploading an event image.

---

## Component Library (4.52.9)

- Adds animated icons (on `aria-pressed`) for plus/minus and hamburger/close symbols.
- Refactors `fileinput` and `imageinput` field components.
- Introduces `IconSection` wrapper component.  
  ➤ `iconSection` renamed to `IconSection__item` and must now be used within the wrapper.

---

## OpenStreetMap Field (0.79.8)

- Adds option to have filters open by default.
- Fixes rendering issues in Gutenberg.

---

## Styleguide (0.11.1251)

- Updates third-party slider library **Splide** to the next major version.
- Refactors `fileinput` and `imageinput` field components.

---

## Algolia Index (3.2.3)

- Ensures excerpts are properly sanitized before storing in the Algolia index.

items.title: Release 5.1.0
items.body:
## Version 5.1.0  

Version 5.1.0 is a patch release for version 5.0.2, fixing some minor issues. This release is designed as a transition release for a plugin switch regarding cookie notices.  

<!--more-->  

We have decided to phase out the [Cookies and Content Security Policy](https://wordpress.org/plugins/cookies-and-content-security-policy/) plugin in favor of [Pressidium Cookie Consent](https://wordpress.org/plugins/pressidium-cookie-consent/).  

### Municipio Theme (5.129.12)  

- Sites that are using a network subfolder structure now link the logotype to the main site ID instead of the current site.  
- Fixes an issue with date handling.  
- Fixes a fatal error when emptying the global notices configuration panel.  
- Fixes a date issue (unformatted dates) in the archive type "list" for some columns.  
- Fixed ordering issues for posts with identical date-time values by forcing the query to fall back on ascending order.  

### Modularity (6.67.7)  

The notice module now supports (thanks to Consid and Alingsås Kommun):  

- Action buttons  
- Placement of action buttons  
- Dismissable notices  

### Component Library (4.48.3)  

- The action button in the notice component can now be placed "aside" or "below" (thanks to Consid and Alingsås Kommun).  
- Linked cards will now have a truncated version of the content in the card to shorten the reading time of links.  

### Styleguide (0.11.1224)  

- The signature component has been modified to resolve excessive spacing on edges.  

### Cookies and Content Security Policy (2.24)  

- This plugin is scheduled to be removed from the install in the upcoming minor release.  

### Pressidium Cookie Consent (1.7.1)  

- This plugin has been added to the install. It will need to be configured before use.

items.title: Release 5.0.2
items.body:
Version 5.0.2 is a patch release for version 5.0.1, fixing some minor issues that have been identified since the last release.

### Municipio Theme (5.129.4)

- **Bugfix:** Refined how timestamps are fetched in archives.
- **Bugfix:** Refined how timestamps are fetched in singular pages.
- **Bugfix:** Fixed ordering issues for posts with identical date-time values by adding an additional `ORDER BY ID` to date queries.
- **Chore:** Adds a template & instructions for generating feature documentation with a LLM.
- **Bugfix:** Resolves some issues with mobile adaption of collapsible search view.

<sub>*Due to the overhaul of dates; events may have to be adjusted to your preference since the date badge has been hardcoded for this post type in some locations.*</sub>

### Modularity (6.67.4)

- **Feature:** Removed the option to specify the source of the post date. It will now automatically match the archive view setting from Municipio.
- **Posts Module Enhancements:**
  - Improved handling of sticky posts and pagination in `GetPosts.php`, addressing potential issues with post counts and page limits. Sticky posts are now correctly merged and sorted.
  - Refactored post preparation and data handling in `Posts.php` and `AbstractController.php`, including adding sticky post data and default values for post objects. Highlighting logic was moved to a dedicated method.
  - Updated template controllers (`ExpandableListTemplate.php`, `ListTemplate.php`) and views (`features-grid.blade.php`, `grid.blade.php`, `index.blade.php`, `news.blade.php`, `segment.blade.php`) to use the new post data structure and handle sticky posts correctly. Added `data-js-item-id` and `attributeList` to post elements for better tracking and extensibility.
  - Modified partials (`box.blade.php`, `collection-item.blade.php`, `news-item.blade.php`) to utilize the updated post data and attributes.
  - Module is now resolving event timestamps correctly. If multiple occasions are resolved, the closest date in the future will be used. If the event is passed, the last will be used.
- **Search Module Update:** Adjusted button styling in `search.blade.php`.

### Styleguide (0.11.1220)

- **Bugfix:** Fix alignment in news items vertically.

### Component Library (4.47.11)

- **Block Component Enhancements:**
  - Added support for date arrays and date badges in `Block.php`, `block.blade.php`, and `block.json`. Ratio class added. Content check added.

- **Card Component Enhancements:**
  - Added support for date arrays and date badges in `Card.php` and `card.json`. Added `has-datebadge` class.
  - Updated date and date badge components in `components/date.blade.php` and `components/datebadge.blade.php` to handle date arrays.

- **Date Component Overhaul:**
  - Completely refactored the `Date` component (`Date.php`, `date.blade.php`) for improved date handling, formatting, and time since/until calculations. Introduced `DateFormatter`, `TimeSinceFormatter`, and `DateConfig` classes for better organization and maintainability. Added error handling for invalid dates. Supports `nowLabel`, `timeNowCap`, and date format setting.
  - Added `DateConfig.php` to handle date formatting configuration.
  - Added `DateFormatter.php` to handle localized date formatting.
  - Added `TimeSinceFormatter.php` to handle time since calculations.

- **News Item Component Enhancements:**
  - Added support for date arrays in `NewsItem.php` and `newsItem.json`. Added standing class.
  - Updated date partial in `partials/date.blade.php` to handle date arrays.

- **Type Hinting Error Handling:** Improved error handling for type hinting issues in `Register.php`, excluding `lang` from the check.

### Algolia Index (3.2.1)

- A patch has been implemented to correctly remove content in `<style>` and `<script>` tags from indexed content.
